narrative:
Hubbard City 2C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 898 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 22.6 percentage points.
